hero.description: Code, robots, and a bit of chaos. Full-stack developer focused on automation and robotics, turning hard problems into things that ship, and sometimes, things that move.

about.label: 01 — About
about.subtitle: Who I am •

headline.p3: — building things since the Lego years.

about.bio_1: Since a kid, always in love with technology and creating. From Lego to robots, I've always loved building things. I've been writing code since I was 13, turned it into a career at 15, and never stopped.
about.bio_2: Today I'm a full-stack developer, a robotics student at UFV, and part of NERo where I build software for educational robots. I like hard problems, clean code, and things that move.

spark.title: The Spark
spark.description: A robotics kit, a first computer, and Python tutorials at midnight. Where it all begins.

first.title: First Projects
first.description: First paid work. Automations, small websites, and the beginning of a career.

pro.title: Going Professional
pro.description: First full-time role at 15. Building real products for real clients at Etho Soluções.

nero.title: University & NERo
nero.description: Computer Science at UFV. Joined NERo — building educational robots that compete.

plataforma.title: Plataforma Empresarial
plataforma.description: Full-stack platform used across every department. Microservices on GCP, role-based dashboards, internal AI.

agent.title: Personal Agent
agent.description: AI agent connected with multiple tools using FastAPI Framework based on Ollama.
